title: melaleuca citrolens
intro: Melaleuca citrolens, also known as the Lemon Myrtle, is a plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia, known for its fragrant leaves and wood. The plant's essential oil has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, helping to soothe skin irritations and combat infections. The health benefits of Lemon Myrtle include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Melaleuca citrolens include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
